title: Create Physics Gun
description: A new model for VMod's Zero Point Energy Field Generator
body:
VMod's Physgun looking a bit off in your Create world? Try the brand new Zero Point Energy Field Manipulator from Vortex ALPHA. Totally not Black Mesa.

Anyway, yes! This is the fabled "Gravity Gun" from Half-Life 2 modelled to fit the Create style. Because everything needs to fit the Create style these days. And yeah, it rocks!
